_comment: The DISCOVERY set of the three-set eval flywheel: a rolling holding area of live-scored DEVIATIONS captured by core/falsify.Scorer (a committed prediction reality falsified — the observed cascade carried a surprise host the prediction never named). This file is DRAINED from the worker's in-memory rolling corpus (falsify.MemDiscoveryCorpus) via eval.DiscoveryCorpus.IngestCaptured, and PROMOTED into the falsifiability regression suite by `go run ./tools/evalgate --discovery`. It is NOT the gate and NOT the sealed holdout — capturing here is additive and cannot weaken the gate. 'key' is the falsify.DiscoveryRecord.DeviationKey signature (target|site|sorted-surprise-hosts). The two settleable, reproduced cases below are grounded in the same placement facts as the frozen fixture (pve04 hosts cap01/claude01/dmz01; pve01 hosts cl01file01/code01/redis02) so they catch a real cascade over estate_fixture.json; the under-reproduced and operator-held cases document the conservative promotion gate.
